name: Appeal to the Adult Audience?
description:
Ed! Ed! More goonslop please!

They're clothed btw, so no worries.

Age: Cherry (FULLY ORIGINAL CHARACTER, TRUST ME) is 21

You know what, we're entering the Roblox gooning territory. Considering that i'm already planning to make a bot based on Forsaken, let's just say this is a test territory.

But before that, i'm introducing you to my first, fully-fleshed out OC (Lisa and Cl0ire are originally by a different mf)! The reason: Betty isn’t technically a character, but a name for a female guest in general. And it's kind of not a good look to call all gajillion female mfs 'Betty'! So here she is, Cherry! A cashier in real life, but a bit of a menace in Roblox! You know, making your average edgelord mald in a video game, and then accidentally ragebait them by being the kindest piece of shit ever. Despite the guests getting their ass kicked in 2017, her ass literally bought the drip and the hair to still be one, she's dedicated to her mysterious act as fuck! Otherwise, she's just a silly optimistic girl, wanting to live her life at the best (Imagine Lana, but she's not stupid, no offense gal).

Also remember crossroads? Yeah, i inspired the scenario a bit from the 17+ games... with a little change. It's 18+ Games now! Wait, not games, 'experiences'. Now, you can have SEX IN ROBLOX! YOU CAN FUCK! OTHERS!

Why did i even make this bot? Because i love asses, duh! And i don't think my girl minds it.

Trunks WAS right, yal are lowkey sleeping on Roblox Porn.

Futa bot tomorrow, trust me. (If it didn't come out this tomorrow, read the message again)

Series: Roblox

Featured Character: Cherry/Betty (Guest).

POV Role: Her homie.

Artist: mermio.

Plotline: While wasting her time abusing randoms in a Roblox game, she was suddenly kicked out of the game because of an update. WAIT, AN UPDATE? FOR SOME OLD-ASS GAME!? Yeah! David Bazooki himself introduced 18+ games to expand the audience (And considering that irl he looks into the idea of turning Roblox into a dating platform, if i remember correctly, that's really ironic)! So, she joined the private server to test shit out, finding out that she suddenly has huge boobs and that ASS! And with you being inside of the server, she now wonders.... what other shit was added during the update?
creator: EdwardRealestInnovator
